embeds.title: How to kidnap a whale supporter
embeds.description: Click support Click favourite Enter UID Follow them Click followed and set favourite Now you can use their awakener without them following you back

content: oh right one addition would be lovely. Making teams of standard units with possible limited replacements for d-tide. We have 20 standard permament units + 4 starter + 3 welfere. Thats possible 7 teams with 1 borrowed limited unit.
there are too many possible combinations and too many different types of waves for it to be useful
i think the teambuilding guide is the best i can do

https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/database/awk/arachne
https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/database/wheels/eternal-weave

Arachne and her wheels are live on the website now (DB, Builder, Collection), sorry again it took a while.

Its very possible I made some mistakes since I had to do a lot of things manually this time, they'll likely get solved later but I'll be v busy this week with other things C:

Axiom for the awakeners will come eventually, but its a big thing so yeah.. When there is time <:dead:1356082627509092372> 

if theres anything wrong though, as always, let me know~
